title: Macrame Window Valance
excerpt: Add a touch of handmade elegance to your windows with this decorative macrame valance.

steps.title: Measure window
steps.description: Measure your window width and cut cords 3 times the desired length.

steps.title: Mount on rod
steps.description: Attach cords directly to the curtain rod using lark's head knots.

steps.title: Knot the design
steps.description: Create 3-4 rows of alternating square knots for a classic diamond pattern.

steps.title: Create fringe
steps.description: Unravel the cord ends and brush out for a soft, flowing fringe.

tips: Use a steamer to smooth out any kinks in the cord
Keep the valance short (30-40cm) to let in maximum light
